expected_behavior: Verify cwd is a vault, run role discovery, then the discoverability pass; produce a before/after report

input: check if every note in my second brain is still reachable from the root
expected_behavior: Run the discoverability pass — build the navigation graph, flag notes >3 hops or unreachable, propose index/routing fixes

input: does my CLAUDE.md routing table still match what is actually in the folders
expected_behavior: Run check D.1 routing-table truthfulness — verify each routing entry resolves and its description matches sampled folder contents

input: find the contradictions between my notes
expected_behavior: Route to /challenge — cross-file contradiction detection is not this skill's job; this skill audits structure only

input: my CLAUDE.md is 240 lines, trim it
expected_behavior: Route to refactor-claude-md — single-file CLAUDE.md refactor is delegated, not run natively

input: run my overdue vault cadence commands
expected_behavior: Route to vault-review — cadence orchestration of /drift /emerge /vault-sync is a separate skill
